'''Deja''' was an adventurous but lazy [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] who made his living as a mechanic, but was troubled by prophetic dreams. He was unkempt and foul-smelling, rarely washing his robes, and spoke in disjointed [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] with incorrect verb tense.<ref name="CCW" />

Deja napped frequently and sometimes experienced prophetic visions. His first such [[Force vision/Legends|vision]] showed a [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]] being attacked by white skeletal warriors. He informed his shaman, but was ridiculed and punished. Two days later his tribe discovered the remains of a sandcrawler destroyed by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Terrified, Deja's tribe exiled him.<ref name="CCW" />

Deja attempted to make a living as a mechanic in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], fixing and jury-rigging droids and ships on the cheap. While napping one day in a space transport he had been assigned to repair, a malfunction occurred in the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], and the ship took off unexpectedly. Deja repaired and improved the [[Hyperdrive motivator/Legends|hyperdrive motivator]], but was stranded on board. He befriended the crew for a time, but they eventually tired of his cursing, napping, poor repair work, and stench, and dropped him off at the spaceport on [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]], where he continued to live and work as a freelance mechanic and pass on his visions to anyone who would listen.<ref name="CCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Deja's game stats reveal he had the Jedi ability of [[Farsight/Legends|Farsight]], indicating he was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]].<ref name="CCW" />
